title: T-008 — Server Action createFa (NPD-a.1) with V01-V02 + RBAC + outbox
prompt:
# T-008 — Server Action createFa (NPD-a.1)

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §7.6, §12 (V01, V02), §2.2 (fa.create)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement createFa Server Action that validates Product_Code (V01 regex ^FA[A-Z0-9]+$), Product_Name non-empty (V02), checks RBAC fa.create, inserts row into product, emits fa.created event.

## Implementation contract
New apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/create-fa.ts as 'use server' function. Takes input (productCode, productName, optional pre-population from brief). Pipeline: 1) RBAC check via hasPermission(currentUser.role,'fa.create'); 2) Zod schema validates V01+V02; 3) Drizzle tx: INSERT product, emitFaEvent('fa.created'); 4) Returns {productCode}. Reject duplicate product_code with FormMessage. Errors: AuthError | ValidationError | DuplicateError.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/create-fa.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/__tests__/create-fa.test.ts [create]
- packages/validation/src/v01-product-code.ts [create]
- packages/validation/src/v02-product-name.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given user role npd_manager and productCode='FA5101' productName='Test', when createFa runs, then product row exists and one outbox_events row event_type='fa.created' is written
2. Given productCode='ZZ123' (V01 fail), when createFa runs, then it throws ValidationError with code 'V01_FORMAT'
3. Given user role core_user has fa.create, when createFa runs, then it succeeds; given user role viewer (no fa.create), when called, then it throws AuthError

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 tests covering happy path, V01 fail, RBAC denial before action exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test create-fa'

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass RBAC check
- Do not commit if outbox emit fails (single tx)
- Do not skip V01/V02 validation

pipeline_inputs.description: createFa Server Action with V01/V02 validation, RBAC gate, transactional product insert + outbox emit.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Action validates input via Zod (V01 regex + V02 non-empty), checks fa.create permission, runs Drizzle transaction inserting product and emitting fa.created via emitFaEvent. Throws typed errors. Tests cover happy path, validation failure, RBAC denial.

Do not build the FA create modal UI (T-021)
